name: Smoked Salmon & Cucumber Tramezzini
recipeIngredient: 8 Thin slices of good quality Italian bread
6 oz Thinly sliced smoked salmon or lox
1 cup Watercress or basil leaves, or mixed baby lettuces
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and several grindings of black pepper.
2. Lay out 4 slices of bread and brush lightly with some of the dressing. Top with the smoked salmon, cucumber, and greens. Drizzle with the remaining dressing and cover with the remaining slices of bread. Press down lightly and cut into halves.
Data per sandwich:
Calories: 329
Carbohydrates: 37g
Monounsaturated fat: 8g
Protein: 14g
Sodium: 772mg
Polyunsaturated fat: 2g
Fat: 12g
Saturated fat: 2g
Cholesterol: 10mg
